raw_consumer_statement:
Complaint Regarding Unauthorized Recurring Subscription Charge by XXXX XXXX To the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, I am filing this complaint regarding a recurring subscription charge from XXXX XXXX that I attempted to cancel before the latest billing cycle. I have disputed this charge with American Express. I attempted to cancel my subscription both online and via phone prior to this renewal date ; however, XXXX XXXX continued to charge my account. 

One significant issue is that XXXXXXXX XXXX provides no receipt or confirmation for attempted cancellations, leaving customers without any verifiable proof of these attempts. In my case, their supporting documentation only states that I did not cancel, without providing actual evidence to support their claim. This lack of documentation severely limits customers ability to contest unauthorized charges.

Since my last use of the product was on XX/XX/XXXX, and my login on XX/XX/XXXX was solely to check account status after noticing the charge, I request an investigation into XXXX XXXX billing practices and a refund of the unauthorized charge. I am hopeful that CFPB can address the lack of transparency in XXXX XXXX cancellation process and prevent other consumers from facing similar issues. 

Thank you for your attention to this matter.
